name: ChatGPT: Export Full Chat
description: Open an existing ChatGPT conversation in the active tab, scroll toward the top to load older turns, and export the transcript plus thread assets.

browser_automation.description: Current-tab ChatGPT transcript export for sequential sync flows.

sequences.name: chatgpt_export_full_chat
sequences.description: Open one chat -> progressively scroll toward the top -> export transcript, metadata, and downloadable thread assets.

steps.name: Open the target ChatGPT conversation in the active tab
Give the thread shell another moment
Wait for the ChatGPT thread surface
Scroll toward the top and export the transcript with asset metadata
